cards.name: Finding Myself
abilities: [keyword:Investigate] for a card that has the same card name as any of your cards. (You don't need to choose a specific card name before you Investigate.)
[hc:tech]: [keyword:Clone]

cards.name: Me, Myself, and I
abilities: [keyword:Tactical Formation] 444: Draw a card.
[hc:instinct]: [keyword:Clone]

cards.name: Perfect Match
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each card name that you played at least twice this turn.
[hc:tech]: [keyword:Clone]

cards.name: Reabsorb Duplicates
abilities: [keyword:Tactical Formation] 44: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.
[team:x-factor-investigations]: [keyword:Clone]

cards.name: Strive for Greatness
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [hc:instinct]: [keyword:Clone]
[hc:instinct]: You get another +2[icon:recruit] usable only to recruit Heroes that cost 5 or more.

cards.name: Bioelectric Surge
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [hc:ranged]: [keyword:Clone]
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 55: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Gladiator's Blades
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [hc:instinct]: [keyword:Clone]
[hc:instinct]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Gene-Spliced Creation
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [team:x-force]: [keyword:Clone]
[hc:ranged][hc:instinct]: [keyword:Shatter] the Mastermind.

cards.name: Find Mutants with Cerebro
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: [keyword:Clone]
[hc:tech]: [keyword:Investigate] the Sidekick Stack for a card and put it in your discard pile.

cards.name: Shared Thoughts
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: [keyword:Clone]
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 22: You get +1[icon:attack].
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 33: [keyword:Investigate] for a card with an [icon:attack] icon.

cards.name: Telepathic Warning
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: [keyword:Clone]
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 22: You get +1[icon:attack].
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 33: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Master Strike, you get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Mind Wipe
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: [keyword:Clone]

[keyword:Tactical Formation] 223: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, you get +2[icon:attack] and you may fight it this turn. If you fight it, put a card from the Bystander stack on top of the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Penance Form
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [hc:strength]: [keyword:Clone]
If you have a Wound in your hand or discard pile, KO it and you get +1[icon:attack]. Otherwise, gain a Wound.

cards.name: Three Sisters Combined
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [hc:strength]: [keyword:Clone]
Draw a card.
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 333: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Uncover Family Secrets
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [hc:covert]: [keyword:Clone]
[keyword:Investigate] for a card that costs 3.

cards.name: Interweaving Powers
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited] [team:x-factor-investigations]: [keyword:Clone]
[keyword:Tactical Formation] 3333: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: X-Factor Investigations
abilities: [keyword:Investigate] for a card that's [hc:strength] and/or [team:x-factor-investigations].

cards.name: Absorb Kinetic Energy
abilities: If any player would gain a Wound, you may discard this card instead. If you do, draw two cards.

cards.name: Go Big
abilities: [keyword:Tactical Formation] 445: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Treasure Hunt
abilities: [keyword:Investigate] for one of these options, then a different option, then a third different option:
A [hc:strength] card. A [team:x-factor-investigations] card. A card that costs 4. A card that costs 5.

cards.name: Grim Tracker
abilities: Choose a number 1 or more. [keyword:Investigate] for a card of that cost.

cards.name: Endless Endurance
abilities: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw two extra cards.

cards.name: Dangerous Maneuver
abilities: [keyword:Tactical Formation] 225: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Superhuman Senses
abilities: Whenever you “reveal“ or “look at“ any number of cards from your deck this turn, you get +1[icon:attack]. (Just drawing or discarding a card from your deck doesn't count.)
Choose a number 1 or more. [keyword:Investigate] for a card of that cost.

cards.name: Echolocation
abilities: Choose a Hero Class. [keyword:Investigate] for a card of that Hero Class.

cards.name: Hypnotic Call
abilities: [hc:covert]: [keyword:Shatter] each Hero currently in the HQ whose printed cost is 2, 4, 6, and/or 8.

cards.name: Three-Octave Arpeggio
abilities: [keyword:Tactical Formation] 246: [keyword:Shatter] all Villains.

cards.name: Splintering Shriek
abilities: [keyword:Shatter] the Mastermind. KO up to two cards from your hand and/or discard pile.

cards.name: Underground Cave-In
abilities: [hc:ranged]: [keyword:Shatter] a Villain in the Sewers.

cards.name: Unearth Tectonic Power
abilities: [keyword:Investigate] for a card that's [hc:ranged] and/or [hc:instinct].

cards.name: Trace the Fault Lines
abilities: [hc:ranged]: [keyword:Investigate] for a card that costs 0. KO it or discard it.

cards.name: Massive Earthquake
abilities: [keyword:Shatter] the Mastermind  or [keyword:Shatter] all Heroes currently in the HQ.

cards.name: Lady Deathstrike
abilities: Always Leads: Reavers
Master Strike: If she is [keyword:Preying] on a player, [keyword:Finish the Prey]. Otherwise, [keyword:Prey] on the fewest [hc:instinct].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player gains two Wounds. Each other player discards two cards. (1-player game: Instead, gain a Wound and discard a card.)

cards.name: Epic Lady Deathstrike
abilities: Always Leads: Reavers
Master Strike: If she is [keyword:Preying] on a player, [keyword:Finish the Prey]. Then, whether she was preying or not, [keyword:Prey] on the fewest [hc:instinct].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player gains Wounds to the top and bottom of their deck. Each other player discards down to three cards. (1-player game: Instead, gain a Wound and discard two cards.)

cards.name: Cybernetic Healing Factor
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final Tactic, and if Lady Deathstrike was not [keyword:Preying] on a player: KO up to two of your Heroes, rescue 4 Bystanders, and shuffle this Tactic back into her remaining Tactics.

cards.name: Prey on the Weak
abilities: Fight: Each Villain that's [keyword:Preying] on a player [keyword:Finishes the Prey]. After those have all entered the city, then each Villain in the city with a “[keyword:Prey]“ Ambush does that Ambush, starting from the Sewers.

cards.name: Relentless Assassin
abilities: Fight: If Lady Deathstrike was not [keyword:Preying] on a player, each other player reveals their hand. She [keyword:Preys] on the one of those players with the fewest non-grey Heroes.

cards.name: Stretching Adamantium Claws
abilities: Fight: You may KO one of your Heroes. If you have a [hc:instinct] Hero, you may instead KO up to two of your Heroes.

cards.name: Bastion, Fused Sentinel
abilities: All Sentinel Masterminds get +1[icon:attack] for each Master Strike in the KO pile, even after Bastion is defeated.
Always Leads: Purifiers and any Sentinel Henchmen Group.

Master Strike: A card from the Bystander Stack ascends to become a 3[icon:attack] “Prime Sentinel“ Mastermind with “Fight: Rescue this. Master Strike: Each player reveals the top card of their deck and discards it if it costs 1 or more.“

cards.name: Epic Bastion, Fused Sentinel
abilities: All Sentinel enemies get +1[icon:attack] for each Master Strike in the KO pile, even after Bastion is defeated.
Always Leads: Purifiers and any Sentinel Henchmen Group.

Master Strike: A card from the Bystander Stack ascends to become a 4[icon:attack] “Prime Sentinel“ Mastermind with “Fight: Rescue this. Master Strike: Each player reveals the top card of their deck and KOs it if it costs 1 or more.“

cards.name: Master Mold, Sentinel Factory
abilities: Fight: Rescue three Bystanders. KO one of your Heroes. Master Mold ascends to become an [rule:additional Mastermind] whose only ability is:
Master Strike: A Sentinel Henchmen from the Villain Deck enters the city. Shuffle the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Template, Infected Sentinel
abilities: Fight: Rescue three Bystanders. KO one of your Heroes. Template ascends to become an [rule:additional Mastermind] whose only ability is:
Master Strike: Each player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or discards one of their non-grey Heroes.

cards.name: Nimrod, Future Sentinel
abilities: Fight: Rescue three Bystanders. KO one of your Heroes. Nimrod ascends to become an [rule:additional Mastermind] whose only abilities are:
Master Strike: Choose [icon:recruit] or [icon:attack]. Each player discards a card with the chosen icon.

cards.name: Machine Man, Sentinel Supereme
abilities: Fight: Rescue three Bystanders. KO one of your Heroes. Machine Man ascends to become an [rule:additional Mastermind] whose only ability is:
Master Strike: Each player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Exodus
abilities: You may pay 3[icon:recruit] any number of times to [keyword:Shatter] Exodus.
Always Leads: Acolytes
Master Strike: Choose [team:x-men], [team:x-force], [team:x-factor-investigations], or [team:brotherhood]. Each player discards one of those Heroes or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Epic Exodus
abilities: Any number of times, you may [keyword:Shatter] Exodus by spending  2[icon:recruit] plus 1[icon:recruit] for each Immortality stacked here.
Always Leads: Acolytes

Master Strike: Stack this Strike next to Exodus as an “Immortality.“ Choose [team:x-men], [team:x-force], [team:x-factor-investigations], or [team:brotherhood]. Each player KOs one of those Heroes or gains a Wound to the top of their deck.

cards.name: Unite All Mutantkind
abilities: Fight: Each other player chooses one of their [team:x-men], [team:x-force], [team:x-factor-investigations], or [team:brotherhood] Heroes to enter the city as a Villain with [icon:attack] equal to its cost and “Fight: Gain this as a Hero.“ If no card enters the city this way, then each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Omega-Level Mutant
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand, discards all their cards that cost 1 or more, then draws that many cards.

cards.name: Avalon, Asteroid Haven
abilities: Fight: You may gain a [team:x-men], [team:x-force], [team:x-factor-investigations], or [team:brotherhood] Hero from the HQ. Each other player discards two cards that aren't any of those teams.

cards.name: Resurrect the Dead
abilities: Fight: Choose a player. That player gains a [team:x-men], [team:x-force], [team:x-factor-investigations], or [team:brotherhood] Hero from the KO pile, then chooses a Non-Henchmen Villain from their Victory Pile to enter the city.

cards.name: Donald Pierce
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the fewest [hc:tech].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: KO one of that player's non-grey Heroes.
Fight: KO one of your grey Heroes.

cards.name: Bonebreaker
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the fewest [hc:strength].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player gains a Wound to the top of their deck.
Fight: Reveal the top card of your deck. KO it or draw it.

cards.name: Skullbuster
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the fewest [hc:ranged]. Skullbuster captures one Bystander from the Bystander Stack and two Bystanders from that player's Victory Pile of their choice.
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: KO the captured Bystanders, and each player discards a card.

cards.name: Pretty Boy
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the fewest [hc:covert].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player discards a card.
Fight: Discard the top card of your deck. If it has a [icon:recruit] icon, you get +1[icon:recruit]  and this Villain [keyword:Preys] on the fewest [hc:covert].

cards.name: Predator X (Ranged)
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [hc:ranged]. [keyword:Clone].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player discards a [hc:ranged] Hero. If they can't, they discard any non-grey Hero instead.

cards.name: Predator X (Tech)
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [hc:tech]. [keyword:Clone].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player discards a [hc:tech] Hero. If they can't, they discard any non-grey Hero instead.

cards.name: Predator X (Covert)
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [hc:covert]. [keyword:Clone].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player discards a [hc:covert] Hero. If they can't, they discard any non-grey Hero instead.

cards.name: Predator X (Instinct)
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [hc:instinct]. [keyword:Clone].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player discards a [hc:instinct] Hero. If they can't, they discard any non-grey Hero instead.

cards.name: Predator X (Strength)
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [hc:strength]. [keyword:Clone].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player discards a [hc:strength] Hero. If they can't, they discard any non-grey Hero instead.

cards.name: Leper Queen
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [team:x-men]+[team:x-force]+[team:x-factor-investigations]+[team:brotherhood].
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: That player gains a Wound and KOs two Bystanders from their Victory Pile.
Fight: Shuffle two cards from the Bystander Stack into the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Reverend William Stryker
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [team:x-men]+[team:x-force]+[team:x-factor-investigations]+[team:brotherhood]. Stryker captures one [rule:Sidekick] from the [rule:Sidekick] Stack and two [rule:Sidekicks] from that player's hand and/or discard pile of their choice.
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: KO the captured [rule:Sidekicks].
Fight: Gain the captured [rule:Sidekicks].

cards.name: Cameron Hodge
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Prey] on the most [team:x-men]+[team:x-force]+[team:x-factor-investigations]+[team:brotherhood]. Cameron Hodge captures one of that player's non-grey Heroes of their choice.
[keyword:Finish the Prey]: KO the captured Hero.
Fight: Choose a player to gain the captured Hero.

cards.name: Unuscione
abilities: You may pay 2[icon:recruit] any number of times to [keyword:Shatter] Unuscione.
Ambush: Unuscione captures a Bystander. [effect:captureBystander]

cards.name: Tempo
abilities: You may [keyword:Shatter] Tempo any number of times. Each time you do this, draw one fewer card when you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn.
Fight: Draw two cards.

cards.name: Frenzy
abilities: You may pay 1[icon:recruit] any number of times to [keyword:Shatter] Frenzy. Each time you do, reveal the top card of the Hero Deck and put it on the bottom of that deck. If it's [hc:strength], gain a Wound. If it's [hc:instinct], the player on your right gains a Wound.
Fight: KO one of your heroes. [effect:koHeroCurrentPlayer]

cards.name: Random
abilities: You may pay 1[icon:recruit] any number of times to [keyword:Shatter] Random. Each time you do, reveal the top card of the Hero Deck and put it on the bottom of that deck. If it's [hc:covert], [hc:tech], or [hc:ranged], Random then gets +[icon:attack] equal to that card's cost.
Escape: Each player discards a card at random.

cards.name: Silver Samurai
abilities: Ambush: The Villain in the city worth the most VP captures a Bystander.
Fight: KO a card from your discard pile.

cards.name: Scarlet Samurai
abilities: Fight: Gain this as a Hero.
[hc:instinct]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Lord Shingen
abilities: Ambush: Lord Shingen captures a Bystander. [effect:captureBystander]

Bystanders held by Lord Shingen are "Samurai Bodyguards." You can't fight Lord Shingen while he has any Bodyguards. You can fight them as if they were 3[icon:attack] Villains with "[keyword:Chivalrous Duel]. Fight: Rescue this as a Bystander."

cards.name: Gorgon
abilities: Ambush: Choose a Hero Name. You can't play Heroes this turn unless they are that Hero Name or grey Heroes.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. [effect:koHeroCurrentPlayer]

henchmen.name: Mr. Sinister Clones
abilities: [keyword:Ambush]: [keyword:Clone]. When the cloned copy enters the city, shuffle a Bystander into the Villain Deck.
[keyword:Fight]: [keyword:Clone] the next Hero you recruit this turn that has printed cost 4 or less.

henchmen.name: Sentinel Squad O∗N∗E∗
abilities: [keyword:Ambush]: If there are no other Sentinel Squad O*N*E*s in the city, [keyword:Clone].
[keyword:Fight]: If there are no other Sentinel Squad O*N*E*s in the city, KO one of your Heroes and put this Villain on the bottom of the Villain Deck.
Setup: 10 Twists.

Twist 1-5: Put a card from the Bystander Stack next to this Scheme as a “Hacker.“ KO a Hero from the HQ with cost equal to the number of Hackers. If you KO'd a Hero this way, stack this Twist next to the Mastermind as “Stolen Cerebro Data.“
Twist 6: Put the Hackers on the bottom of the Bystander Stack. This Scheme [rule:Transforms] into a random [rule:Unveiled Scheme]. Do its Twist effect.
When revealed: Twists stacked next to the Mastermind are “Manipulations.“ Shuffle a random extra Hero into a face down “Mutant Messiah“ stack.

Twist: Add this Twist to the Manipulations. [keyword:Investigate] the Mutant Messiah stack for a card and set it aside. This turn you may gain that card to the top of your deck by spending [icon:recruit] equal to its cost, +1[icon:recruit] for each Manipulation. If you don't, then put that card into a “Fallen Messiah“ stack next to the Scheme.
Evil Wins: When there are 3 cards in the Fallen Messiah stack or the Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 11 Twists.

Twist 1-6: Stack the top two cards of the [rule:Sidekick] Stack face down next to the Scheme as “Kidnapped Mutants.“ If there were any Kidnapped Mutants already there, put those on the bottom of the [rule:Sidekick] Stack and put this Twist next to the Mastermind as a “Drained Power.“
Special Rules: Playes may spend 3[icon:recruit] or 3[icon:attack] to gain a Kidnapped Mutant.
Twist 7: KO all Kidnapped Mutants. This Scheme [rule:Transforms] into a random [rule:Unveiled Scheme]. Do its Twist effect.
When revealed: Shuffle a random additional Villain Group into the Villain Deck. Twists stacked next to the Mastermind are “Temporal Rifts.“

Twist: Add this Twist to the Temporal Rifts. Then reveal and set aside cards from the Villain Deck equal to the number of Temporal Rifts. Play a Henchman you revealed, then play the Villain you revealed that is worth the most VP. Shuffle the other set aside cards into the Villain Deck. (If the Villain Deck runs out during this, that doesn't end the game.)
Evil Wins: When there are 7 Temporal Rifts or the Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 9 Twists.

Twist 1-4: If there are any “Singularity Investigators“ in the city, stack this Twist next to the Mastermind as a “Dark Discovery.“ Whether you did that or not, [keyword:Investigate] the Bystander Stack for a card and have it enter the city as a “Singularity Investigator“ Villain. It has 6[icon:attack] and “Fight: Rescue this as a Bystander. Then KO one of your Heroes. Then [keyword:Investigate] your deck for a card with a [icon:recruit] icon.“
Twist 5: This Scheme [rule:Transforms] into a random [rule:Unveiled Scheme]. Do its Twist effect.
When revealed: Twists stacked next to the Mastermind are “Cloning Breakthroughs.“

Twist: Add this Twist to the Cloning Breakthroughs. The top card of the Hero Deck enters the city as an “Evil Clone“ Villain. [keyword:Clone] a copy of it from the HQ or Hero Deck as another Evil Clone.
Special Rules: Each Evil Clone has [icon:attack] equal to its cost plus the number of Cloning Breakthroughs. It has “Fight: A player gains this as a Hero. KO one of your Heroes.“
Evil Wins: When there are 7 Evil Clones in the city and/or Escape Pile, or the Villain Deck or Hero Deck runs out.
Setup: 8 Twists.
Twist 1-3: If there is a Villain in the Bank, stack this Twist next to the Mastermind as a “Mutant Genome.“ Otherwise, move a Villain from another city space to the Bank.
Twist 4: This Scheme [rule:Transforms] into a random [rule:Unveiled Scheme]. Do its Twist effect.
When revealed: Twists stacked next to the Mastermind are “Bioweapon Adaptations.“
Twist: Add this Twist to the Bioweapon Adaptations. Then for each card in that stack, choose a different number from 2-6. KO all Heroes from the HQ that have any of those costs.
Evil Wins: When there are 15 non-grey Heroes in the KO pile or the Villain Deck or Hero Deck runs out.
When you rescue this Bystander, [keyword:Clone] the next Hero you recruit this turn that has printed cost 3 or less.
When you rescue this Bystander, [keyword:Shatter] a Villain in the Bank or [keyword:Shatter] a Hero in the HQ space under the Bank.
When you rescue this Bystander, choose [icon:recruit] or [icon:attack]. [keyword:Investigate] for a card with that icon.
